headline: Personal Line Carriers Expected to Post Strong Underwriting in 2026, Morgan Stanley Says
summary: Personal line carriers such as Progressive (PGR) and Travelers (TRV) are positioned to report strong

headline: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods Maintains Market Perform on The Hartford Insurance Gr, Raises Price Target to $143
summary: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods  analyst Meyer Shields   maintains The Hartford Insurance Gr (NYSE:HIG) with a Market Perform and raises the price target from $142 to $143.
